display.purpose: Name 'TangTang' — the single biggest text on the page.

label.purpose: Attribution lines, stack tags. Never in nav or headings.

shadows.name: avatar-ring
shadows.purpose: Phoenix-rose ring around avatar circle (One Signal sanctioned).

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for iUp entrance, page transitions, and state changes.

motion.name: iup-initial-delay
motion.purpose: Delay before iUp cascade begins on page load.

motion.name: page-enter
motion.purpose: Route-change fade-in for content layer (3D canvas stays mounted).

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Pill-shaped navigation link. Phoenix-rose dot on active state only.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9rem; background: transparent; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-nav-link.active { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-link.active::before { content:''; display:inline-block; width:5px; height:5px; border-radius:50%; background:#fb5959; }

components.name: Primary Button / CTA
components.description: Phoenix-rose accent button — used sparingly, max one per screen (only on screens without the nav active dot).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(251,89,89,0.16); border: 1px solid rgba(251,89,89,0.45); color: #ffffff; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(251,89,89,0.24); border-color: rgba(251,89,89,0.65); }

components.name: Ghost Back Link
components.description: Transparent pill with hairline border — used for back navigation on inner pages.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; padding: 10px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4); color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); text-decoration: none; font-size: 0.9rem; background: transparent; transition: background 0.2s ease, color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); color: #ffffff; }

components.name: Avatar Circle
components.description: 112px circle with phoenix-rose ring + 3D hover. Click triggers WeChat modal.
components.css: .ds-avatar { width: 112px; height: 112px; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.18), 0 0 0 6px rgba(251,89,89,0.2), 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.4); transition: box-shadow 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1), transform 0.28s cubic-bezier(0.25,1,0.5,1); } .ds-avatar:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,0.3), 0 0 0 8px rgba(251,89,89,0.35), 0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-avatar img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }

components.name: Inner Page Container
components.description: Translucent dark container for Blog, About, NoteDetail, Resume — lets the global 3D canvas bleed through (~30%) with a light veil for readability.
components.html:
Notes

痕迹

← 返回首页
components.css: .ds-inner-page { min-height: 100vh; background-color: rgba(10,14,31,0.7); background-image: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 8%, rgba(251,89,89,0.10), transparent 30%), radial-gradient(circle at 88% 16%, rgba(98,72,164,0.12), transparent 32%); padding: 40px 20px; } .ds-inner-title { font-size: clamp(2rem, 6vw, 3.5rem); font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; margin-bottom: 16px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-inner-desc { font-size: 1rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); margin-bottom: 40px; }

narrative.overview:
This system is built on the conviction that technical identity should feel as precise as the code it represents. A deep blue-violet cosmos absorbs attention and pushes content forward; every element earns its place through function and contrast, not decoration.

The palette speaks quietly but confidently: deep-space blue-violet darks, clean whites, white→lilac-pink procedural crystals, and one sharp signal color — Phoenix Rose — reserved for the single most important moment on any screen.

A single procedural Three.js crystal field (IcosahedronGeometry + MeshPhysicalMaterial transmission + Bloom postprocessing + distant dust, no external models) is mounted globally in App.tsx and shared by every route, so the 3D never unmounts on navigation — the background stays continuous while content layers fade in over it.
keyCharacteristics: Deep blue-violet immersive full-bleed 3D background (global, never unmounts on route change)
Single accent color (Phoenix Rose #fb5959) used sparingly — 3D signal crystal, nav active dot, avatar ring, focus ring
White→lilac-pink crystal body (MeshPhysicalMaterial transmission + Bloom glow); violet #6248a4 as secondary glow
White text hierarchy with opacity-stepped supporting text
Monospace labels for technical context only
Cascaded entrance animations + route-change fade — purposeful, never idle

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Phoenix Rose (#fb5959) appears on at most one sanctioned element per screen (3D signal crystal / nav active dot / avatar ring). It is a signal, not a theme — never on body text, badges, or card borders.

rules.name: The Global 3D Rule
rules.body: The 3D crystal canvas is mounted once in App.tsx and shared by all routes. Inner pages must use a translucent veil (rgba(10,14,31,~0.7)) so the 3D bleeds through (~30%) — never an opaque background that hides the canvas.

rules.name: The Mono Boundary Rule
rules.body: Monospace is used exclusively for technical metadata. Never in navigation, headings, or body prose.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No box-shadow on nav items, cards, or containers at rest (avatar ring is the sole exception). Hover states may use a subtle background fill — never a shadow.

rules.name: The Procedural-First Rule
rules.body: All 3D geometry and motion is procedurally generated via Three.js native Materials + Bloom postprocessing. Never import external glb/gltf models — zero copyright risk, original, lightweight.

rules.name: The Reduced-Motion Rule
rules.body: Every 3D effect and animation must degrade: matchMedia prefers-reduced-motion freezes the crystal field to a single static frame (renderOnce), unbinds mouse/scroll drivers, and CSS disables transitions/animations.

dos: Do use Phoenix Rose (#fb5959) on at most one sanctioned element per screen.
Do keep the global 3D canvas bleeding through inner pages at ~30% (translucent veil, never opaque).
Do mount the 3D canvas once in App.tsx so route changes never unmount it.
Do use clamp() for all display and headline sizes.
Do use monospace exclusively for technical metadata and attribution.
Do include @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) for every animation.
Do cascade entrance animations with 150ms stagger.
donts: Don't use a white or light background on any page.
Don't import external 3D models (glb/gltf) — procedural crystals only.
Don't put Phoenix Rose on body text, badges, card borders, or more than one element per screen.
Don't use monospace font in navigation or headings.
Don't animate CSS layout properties — only transform and opacity.
Don't give inner pages an opaque background that hides the global 3D canvas.
Don't add more than 3 items to the main navigation.
